short_summary: US-Iran deal close, Western focus risk
rationale: The sustained US-Iran deal momentum with Lebanon fighting continuing is the key concern for Ukraine — US diplomatic and military attention remains partially diverted; no new direct military escalation on Ukrainian territory reported this cycle.

top_events.title: US and Iran say deal close, Lebanon fighting continues
top_events.summary: US diplomatic focus on Iran deal risks diverting attention and resources from Ukraine. Lebanon strikes show the region remains volatile, keeping US engaged away from Kyiv's priorities.

top_events.title: US orders Anthropic to disable AI for foreign nationals
top_events.summary: US federal AI restrictions on foreign nationals could affect Ukrainian researchers and government users relying on US AI tools, a minor but new concern.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war active combat continues
top_events.summary: War continues at maximum background intensity; no qualitative change reported this cycle — baseline remains at extreme level.
